phase_01.status_text: T 38.9°C. HR 112. BP 102/68. Blood cultures drawn; results pending.

phase_02.status_text: Blood cultures positive. MRI: osteomyelitis with adjacent abscess. SCr 2.3 mg/dL.

phase_02b.status_text: Preliminary Gram stain: gram-positive cocci in clusters. Identification and susceptibilities pending.

phase_03.status_text: Persistent purulent drainage. Source control decision required.

phase_04.status_text: SCr 2.3 mg/dL. Renal dosing reassessment needed.

phase_05.status_text: Blood culture finalized. Organism identification and susceptibilities available.

phase_06.status_text: Clinical response phase — repeat cultures and wound status on chart.

phase_07.status_text: Plan duration and route for remaining antimicrobial course.

phase_08.status_text: Discharge planning — outpatient monitoring and OPAT coordination.
